meta.title: Guinea to the World — International travel agency
meta.description: Language immersions, tourism, flight tickets and tailor-made support. From Guinea to the whole world — travel with a house you can trust.

hero.sub: Language immersions, tourism, flight tickets and tailor-made support. From Guinea to the whole world — travel with a house you can trust.
hero.bgPlaceholder: Cinematic image — plane wing at sunset or Accra skyline

services.intro: Six specialities, one house. From the first idea to your return home, every detail is orchestrated from our head office in Conakry — to every destination in the world.

items.title: Immersion & languages
items.desc: Supervised language stays in Accra and Conakry: intensive English, housing and personal follow-up.

items.title: Tourism & travel
items.desc: Discovery tours, excursions and organised stays across West Africa and beyond.

items.title: Flight tickets
items.desc: Best-fare bookings across all airlines, with personalised route advice.

items.title: Visa assistance
items.desc: Full application file, appointment booking and step-by-step follow-up.

items.title: Accommodation
items.desc: Safe, verified housing: residences, hotels and trusted host families.

items.title: Purchasing & business travel
items.desc: Support for your trade missions: sourcing, purchasing and local connections.

why.title1: A house that watches over you,

items.title: A-to-Z support
items.desc: From first contact to your return: we handle every detail of your travel project.

items.title: Attentive supervision
items.desc: Your children and loved ones are personally looked after, on site, throughout their stay.

items.title: Fast procedures
items.desc: Simplified paperwork and efficient handling of your file, with no wasted time.

items.title: Effective training
items.desc: Proven immersion programmes, with measurable progress from the very first weeks.

founder.title: Sékou Gassama, your bridge between Guinea and Ghana
founder.body: Former president of the association of Guineans living in Ghana, Sékou has built a solid network on the ground — schools, residences, administrations. Every participant is welcomed at the airport, housed and personally supervised. That is why parents entrust us with their children with complete peace of mind.
founder.quote: “Your safety and your success are our only priority — from departure to return.”
founder.name: Sékou Gassama
founder.portraitPlaceholder: Portrait of the founder — Sékou Gassama

testimonials.aside: — and they say it better than we do

items.quote: My son spent three months in immersion in Accra. Impeccable supervision, regular news — I recommend it to every parent.
items.name: Mariama D.

items.quote: Thanks to GTTW my English made a huge leap. Housing, school, outings: everything was organised — all I had to do was learn.
items.name: Ibrahima S.

items.quote: Tickets, visa, hotel for my trade mission in Ghana: all sorted in a few days. A real time-saver.
items.name: Fatoumata C.

finalCta.body: Write to us today — we reply quickly, in French and in English.

footer.about: International travel agency based in Conakry with a presence in Accra. Immersion, tourism, tickets and personal support — your gateway to the world.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Guinea to the World. All rights reserved.
